item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-05)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40800 Trending skills: 16707 Hot skills: 2388 Top All Time: find-skills (416914) Top Trending: find-skills (14630) Top Hot: fun-brainstorming (793)

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#45): agent-tools
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 21445 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#46): twitter-automation
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 21253 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. Apps: x/post-tweet, x/post-create (with media), x/post-like, x/post-retweet, x/dm-send, x/user-follow. Capabilities: post tweets, schedule content, like posts, retweet, send DMs, follow users, get profiles. Use for: social media automation, content scheduling, engagement bots, audience growth, X API. Triggers: twitter api, x api, tweet automation, post to twitter, twitter bot, social media automation, x automation, tweet scheduler, twitter integration, post tweet, twitter post, x post, send tweet

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#47): remotion-render
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 21061 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4. Supports all Remotion APIs: useCurrentFrame, useVideoConfig, spring, interpolate, AbsoluteFill, Sequence. Configurable resolution, FPS, duration, codec. Use for: programmatic video generation, animated graphics, motion design, data-driven videos, React animations to video. Triggers: remotion, render video from code, tsx to video, react video, programmatic video, remotion render, code to video, animated video, motion graphics code, react animation video

item.title: [All Time] New entry (#50): ai-image-generation
item.description: New entry in All Time leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 21024 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): recipe-create-presentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 34 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a new Google Slides presentation and add initial slides.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 578 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): recipe-create-meet-space
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 33 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a Google Meet meeting space and share the join link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): recipe-bulk-download-folder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: List and download all files from a Google Drive folder.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): recipe-create-gmail-filter
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a Gmail filter to automatically label, star, or categorize incoming messages.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): recipe-find-free-time
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Query Google Calendar free/busy status for multiple users to find a meeting slot.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): recipe-backup-sheet-as-csv
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Export a Google Sheets spreadsheet as a CSV file for local backup or processing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): recipe-compare-sheet-tabs
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read data from two tabs in a Google Sheet to compare and identify differences.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): gws-meet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Manage Google Meet conferences.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): recipe-batch-rename-files
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 32 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Rename multiple Google Drive files matching a pattern to follow a consistent naming convention.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): gws-forms
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read and write Google Forms.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): recipe-review-meet-participants
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Review who attended a Google Meet conference and for how long.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): recipe-share-doc-and-notify
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Share a Google Docs document with edit access and email collaborators the link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): recipe-schedule-recurring-event
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a recurring Google Calendar event with attendees.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): recipe-create-shared-drive
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a Google Shared Drive and add members with appropriate roles.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): recipe-generate-report-from-sheet
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read data from a Google Sheet and create a formatted Google Docs report.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): recipe-cancel-and-notify
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Delete a Google Calendar event and send a cancellation email via Gmail.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): recipe-create-vacation-responder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Enable a Gmail out-of-office auto-reply with a custom message and date range.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): recipe-reschedule-meeting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Move a Google Calendar event to a new time and automatically notify all attendees.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): recipe-plan-weekly-schedule
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Review your Google Calendar week, identify gaps, and add events to fill them.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): recipe-find-large-files
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Identify large Google Drive files consuming storage quota.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): recipe-block-focus-time
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create recurring focus time blocks on Google Calendar to protect deep work hours.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): recipe-send-personalized-emails
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Read recipient data from Google Sheets and send personalized Gmail messages to each row.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): recipe-save-email-to-doc
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Save a Gmail message body into a Google Doc for archival or reference.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Add a list of attendees to an existing Google Calendar event and send notifications.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): recipe-create-doc-from-template
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Copy a Google Docs template, fill in content, and share with collaborators.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): recipe-label-and-archive-emails
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Apply Gmail labels to matching messages and archive them to keep your inbox clean.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): recipe-save-email-attachments
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Find Gmail messages with attachments and save them to a Google Drive folder.

item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Create a Google Drive folder structure and move files into the right locations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): recipe-batch-reply-to-emails
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 31 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Find Gmail messages matching a query and send a standard reply to each one.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): nano-banana-2
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 857 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Generate images with Google Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview (Nano Banana 2) via inference.sh CLI. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input (up to 14 images), Google Search grounding. Triggers: nano banana 2, nanobanana 2, gemini 3.1 flash image, gemini 3 1 flash image preview, google image generation

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): gws-admin
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 30 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google Workspace Admin SDK: Manage users, groups, and devices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): gws-people
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 30 Source: googleworkspace/cli Description: Google People: Manage contacts and profiles.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#31): fun-brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 4925 Source: roin-orca/skills Description: Invoke before any creative or architectural work — feature design, component creation, or behavioral changes. A streamlined brainstorming process optimized for fast, focused decision-making.
